retro.notes: All three requirements are fully satisfied by the two-file change (SKILL.md wording update + skills-include.test.js assertions). The specs/ additions are expected SDD workflow artifacts and do not affect product behavior. The docs/project_structure.md change is unplanned and introduces a structural defect: the first {{text}} directive is left unclosed ({{/text}} removed) and the Shared Libraries {{text}} block lacks a closing tag — this matches the APPROVED proposals in review.md but those fixes were not applied before finalize.
